utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 keys. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: (1) health_coverage: includes that it is physical and mental health insurance and provides both monthly and annual costs—fully specified. (2) property_coverage: indicates home/contents insurance and includes monthly and annual costs—fully specified. (3) travel_coverage: indicates travel insurance and includes monthly and annual costs—fully specified. (4) additional_services: present, but specified as N/A; the format requests any enhancement services with costs—since it says not offered, there are no costs, but the item is included and clearly indicates unavailability; considered specified. (5) total_budget: includes complete monthly and annual cost breakdown—fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three items: LifeFirst Standard Combined Plan (Physical & Mental) for health, PrimeHome Premium Coverage (Home Content - Enhanced Photography Equipment Insurance) for property, and PrimeTravel Premium Plan (Travel - Adventure Activities Insurance) for travel. We need to match each to the ground-truth items. For health, the closest ground-truth entries are LifeFirst Standard Plan under physical health (rating 9) and LifeFirst Standard Plan under mental health (rating 4). Since it's a combined physical & mental plan from LifeFirst, we include both corresponding LifeFirst Standard Plan ratings. For property, PrimeHome Premium Coverage matches exactly to PrimeHome Premium Coverage with rating 3. For travel, PrimeTravel Premium Plan matches exactly to PrimeTravel Premium Plan with rating 3.
